reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación, tiene un lindo Parquizado con sillas y medias atrás, bueno para hacer una pausa en el viaje y parar a comer. Lástima la basura que hay.
A los viajeros, si parar un ratito a comer en el parquecito: ¡¡¡NO DEJES LA BASURA (botellas, envoltorios, paquetes, servilletas, etc) TIRADAS EN EL PISO, SI EL CESTO DE BASURA ESTA LLENO, LLEVATE TU BASURA CON VOS PARA DESECHARLA DE MANERA CORRECTA!!!

(Translated by Google)
Good location, it has a nice park area with benches and seating in the back, good for taking a break during your trip and stopping for a bite to eat. It's a shame about the litter.
To travelers, if you stop for a bite to eat in the park: DO NOT LEAVE YOUR TRASH (bottles, wrappers, packages, napkins, etc.) ON THE GROUND. IF THE TRASH CAN IS FULL, TAKE YOUR TRASH WITH YOU TO DISPOSE OF IT PROPERLY!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcThDOV93RRAB
